Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development is present. Represented by Mary Gillespie.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Steven Gay is present.
Attorney representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Oct-09-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
